summary: checkPgHealth liveness probe (SELECT 1) passes but writes fail — need write-readiness probe alongside liveness probe
No periodic health re-checks — HealthRegistry data goes stale after init; component that silently fails (PG pool exhaustion, DuckDB crash) shows healthy forever
Health status enum mismatch: checkPgHealth returns 'healthy'|'degraded'|'unhealthy' but HealthRegistry uses HealthStatus.Healthy|Degraded|Down|Unknown — no mapping exists
checkPgHealth runs outside Effect runtime in sidecar init — PG health never reaches HealthRegistry; need bridge between sidecar health check and Effect-based HealthRegistry
Transitive dependency degradation: DuckDB depends on PG for metadata — if PG is unhealthy, DuckDB should be at best 'degraded' even if its own health check passes
Plugin crash counter may not persist before app crash — flaky plugin that crashes the app escapes quarantine on restart because counter wasn't flushed
